nasb.text: The fool has said in his heart, “There is no God.” They are corrupt, they have committed abominable deeds; There is no one who does good.

esv.text: The fool says in his heart, “There is no God.” They are corrupt, they do abominable deeds; there is none who does good.

cnv.text: 愚頑人心裡說：“沒有　神。” 他們都是敗壞，行了可憎的事， 沒有一個行善的。

ccb.text: 愚昧人心里想：“没有上帝。” 他们全然败坏，行为邪恶， 无人行善。

csbs.text: 愚顽人心里说：“没有神！” 他们都败坏，行为可憎； 没有人行善。
